rooms.name: POWR 1
rooms.narrative: POWR 1 is vegetatively-steered this week. Overnight dryback ran 52.2 absolute pp against a veg target band of 5-15 absolute pp; shot cadence held the P1/P2 schedule with P3 driving steering.
